summary: A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000001) of type Type-A has been filed regarding a transaction between customer John Jensen and counterparty Jeremy Martinez. The transaction occurred on 2022-10-07, involving a cash deposit transfer of NPR 535368.64. The transaction involved account numbers NP00000000003412850188 and NP00000000003980427782 at banks PCBL and SBL, respectively. The countries involved include GB. The reason for the suspicious transaction report is that a suspicious transaction was observed, although specific details of the suspicious activity are not available. The report is based on available information and further review may be necessary to determine the nature of the transaction.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000002) was filed for Sally Dominguez, a customer of ADBL, due to a transaction that triggered an internal threshold alert. On 2022-10-07, Dominguez conducted a cash withdrawal transfer of NPR 21,807.13 to Henry King, with account numbers NP00000000000983174071 and NP00000000000894070684 involved. The transaction was routed through HBL and involved countries GB and IN. The amount and velocity of the transaction were deemed inconsistent with Dominguez's declared income profile. No adverse media or sanctions matches were found, but the pattern of transfers, which were executed in rapid succession and below reporting thresholds, raised suspicions. The report was submitted for further analysis, involving ADBL and HBL, and does not imply wrongdoing.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000003) was filed for customer Cook, Flores and Ray due to a transaction that triggered an internal threshold alert. On 2022-10-07, the customer conducted a cross-border transfer of NPR 1,214,019.81 to counterparty Chad Mccarty, utilizing account numbers NP00000000002968635055 and NP00000000000310823462 at banks KUMARI and SBL. The transaction involved countries GB and MX. The amount and velocity of the funds were deemed not fully consistent with the customer's declared income profile. The report was submitted for further analysis, noting that the customer has been with the institution for some years and no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified, but the pattern of transfers appears to be deliberately kept below reporting thresholds.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000004) was filed for Robert King's account at PRABHU, which also involved LAXMI bank, due to a transaction on 2022-10-07. The transaction was a cross-border transfer of NPR 813935.97 to Sarah English. The transfer involved account numbers NP00000000001187666276 and NP00000000004011650754, and occurred between GB and NG. The report was triggered by an internal threshold alert and the compliance desk's review, which noted the transaction's value and velocity were not fully consistent with Robert King's declared income profile. The customer has been with the institution for some years, and no adverse media or sanctions matches were identified. The report is submitted for further analysis, and the transaction mode was a cross-border transfer.

A Suspicious Transaction Report (RPT-2026-000005) of type Type-A has been filed regarding a transaction between Porter LLC and Terrence Davis. The transaction occurred on 2022-10-07, involving a debit card transfer of NPR 1610735.12 through MEGA bank. The transaction involved account numbers NP00000000003628175933 and NP00000000003038338293. The countries involved include GB. The reason for the suspicious transaction report is that a suspicious transaction was observed, however, no additional details are provided. The report is based on available information and does not imply any wrongdoing. Further review may be necessary to determine the nature of the transaction.
